findings.description: Digital signature metadata surfaced as visible text in the HTML, disrupting reading order between the 'From' field and the 'Subject' field.
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 shows 'From: Larry Frost, Engineer / Division of Waste Management / Solid Waste Section' followed directly by 'Subject: Meeting Officer's Report'. The HTML inserts 'Digitally signed by LYF / DN: cn=LYF, o=DWM, ou=SWS, email=larry.frost@ncdenr.gov, c=US / Date: 2016.05.12 12:11:52 -04'00'' between the From and Subject fields. This metadata is not visually rendered in the PDF.

findings.description: The handwritten-style signature image visible next to the 'From: Larry Frost' line in the PDF is missing from the HTML. The digital signature metadata text is present, but the visual signature graphic has no corresponding tag.
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 shows a handwritten signature image adjacent to the digital signature block. The HTML renders only the textual digital signature info ('Digitally signed by LYF / DN: cn=LYF, o=DWM...') without the signature graphic.
